2605.28526.title: Entropy-aware Masking for Masked Language Modeling
2605.28526.paper_summary: Masked language modeling has become a standard pretraining objective for training encoder-based language models. In this approach, certain tokens in the input are masked, and the model learns to predict them using the surrounding context. This process enables the model to capture both syntactic and semantic properties of language. Conventionally, the tokens selected for masking are chosen at random, which may not always yield the most effective learning signals. In this work, we examine a token masking strategy based on entropy distribution. We use the model's entropy over token predictions to identify which tokens should be masked. This method aims to target tokens that are more informative and uncertain to improve the training efficacy. We also propose a novel self-masking approach that enhances training efficiency without relying on an external reference model. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves an average performance improvement of 5% in GLUE scores compared to the baseline. Further, we experiment with combining knowledge distillation with entropy masking, resulting in the best overall results.
2605.28526.paper_summary_zh: 被遮蔽的語言建模已成為訓練基於編碼器的語言模型的標準預訓練目標。<lb/>在這種方法中，輸入中的某些標記會被遮蔽，模型學習使用周圍的上下文來預測它們。<lb/>這一過程使模型能夠捕捉語言的語法和語義特性。<lb/>傳統上，選擇遮蔽的標記是隨機選擇的，這可能不總是產生最有效的學習信號。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們檢查了一種基於熵分佈的標記遮蔽策略。<lb/>我們利用模型對標記預測的熵來識別應該被遮蔽的標記。<lb/>這種方法旨在針對更具信息量和不確定性的標記，以提高訓練效能。<lb/>我們還提出了一種新穎的自我遮蔽方法，該方法在不依賴外部參考模型的情況下提高訓練效率。<lb/>實驗結果表明，我們的方法在GLUE分數上相比基準達到了平均5%的性能提升。<lb/>此外，我們還實驗將知識蒸餾與熵遮蔽相結合，取得了最佳的整體結果。
2605.28526.author: Gokul Srinivasagan et.al.
2605.28526.authors: Gokul Srinivasagan, Kai Hartung, Munir Georges
